description:
Guide a cosmic serpent in Astrophidia, an arcade action game inspired by the classic Snake combined with a Match twist!

• Devour Planets to score points while switching orbits to avoid Asteroids and reach your target.
• Match planets of the same type in your body and Consume them! The higher the match, the higher the bonus.
• Rotate planets and asteroids to open new paths.
• Use the Drop Tail skill strategically to reorder your planets.
• Be careful: each asteroid collision will destroy several planets and can even kill you!

Legend says that when the cosmic serpent has had its fill, a Space Storm will trigger and a Portal will appear. Enduring the storm's dangers can lead to higher bonuses, while entering the portal leads to another area with higher multipliers, but also increasing speed!
